## What happened?
<!-- Describe the bug clearly. What did you see that was wrong? -->


## What did you expect to happen?
<!-- What should have happened instead? -->


## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Screenshots or video
<!-- Paste a screenshot here if you have one -->


## Environment
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome, Safari, Edge, Firefox)
- **Device:** (e.g. Desktop, iPhone, Android tablet)
- **App / Page:** (e.g. Bidding page, Catalog, Ideas list)

## How severe is this?
- [ ] 🔴 Critical — app is broken or unusable
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — something is wrong but there's a workaround
- [ ] 🟢 Minor — cosmetic or low-impact issue

## Additional context
